series_metadata.series_title: Operational Reviews and Technical Assistance Support Records
series_metadata.series_description: Review, analysis and technical support of primarily Employee and Business services program operations to recommend process improvements that will facilitate agency operating efficiency and employee performance. Records include operational assessments, database and software designs, research materials, meeting notes, statistical reports measuring performance, and process improvement recommendations.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain in office until no longerof administrative value, thendestroy., Electronic: Erase
